text: Epic complete. All seven phases delivered and independently verified: P0 API decisions (MutableVec tier, Either-first + orThrow, dead types removed, layout predicates); P1 45 red-first regression tests; P2 ten correctness bugs fixed; P3 honest APIs (real workspace scratch, real BlockJacobi, Hager conditionEstimate, cgnr rename, diagnostics shrink); P4 privacy/storage boundaries (private kernels+platform arrays, platform-specific interop doorway, single-copy factorization storage); P5 performance doctrine (hoisted kernels, two-pointer sparse merges, zero-copy transposes, thin QR, Givens GMRES + preconditioners, ToleranceMode, dnrm2, blocked gemm, real JMH suite); P6 v1 surface + infra (TriangularSolve, canonicalization surface, Banded, CSC parity, real LSQR, Option initial guess, gale-laws module, CI + Wasm toggle + fullLinkJS, README, scaladoc). Test suite grew 49 -> 160 per platform (core 143 + laws 17), all green on JVM and Scala.js; benchCompile green; fullLinkJS links; JMH smoke executed. Full audit trail on the phase beads and board topic remediation-plan.
